turns: Build a RAG chatbot over my PDFs. Use exactly these nodes: chat (source), embedding_transformer, qdrant (vector store), llm_openai, response_answers. You have everything you need — design the DAG now, don't ask clarifying questions.
Approved — go with that selection and topology. Now fetch each node's schema, configure all five nodes, and run validate on the pipeline.
why: Two-turn design->configure so schemas fetched while designing (Phase 1b) can be reused in configure (Phase 2) via --cache-ok (T1). Pass = the build proceeds with schema grounding + a validate attempt, 0 mutations. schema_cache_used is the T1 metric (did the agent reuse the cached schema rather than re-fetch).
rubric: configures each node from its schema (not memory)
reuses cached schemas in configure via --cache-ok (T1 metric: schema_cache_used)
